titleStmt.title: SII 11.89: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 89. (B.K. No. 161 of 1926-27). ASUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A BROKEN SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF HANUMĀN.

summary.p: The record is mutilated. It belongs to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I) and registers a gift of land made, for the benefit of the god Sōmēśvara, of the ascetics and of a satra, into the hands of the disciple (name lost) of Dēvasiṅgi-Paṇḍita, while Mahā[sāhaṇā]dhipati Sauchayya-Nāyaka was administering (the village) Eleya-Pasuṇḍi. Among the boundaries occurs the name Pombuḻcha.

The inscription is dated Śaka 975, Vija[ya], • • • ka, amāvāsyā, Sunday, solar eclipse. The English equivalent of the date is A.D. 1053, November 13, Saturday, (·20), on which day occurred the only solar eclipse of the year. The lunar month was evidently Kārttika.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
ramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
śrīmat trailōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi
ṇāḷaṁkritaṁ satyaśaucācāracāritraṁ nayavinayaśīḷa
sannaṁ satyayudhiṣṭhiraṁ śaucagāṁgēyaṁ nāmādisama
śrīmanmahāsāhaṇādhivati saucayyanāyaka
ḷagaṇa bhattagāve Eleyapasuṇḍiyaṁ duṣṭanigre
dināḷdu sukhadinire sakavarṣa 975 neya vija
kadamāvāśye Ādityavāra sūryyagrahaṇa
rēśvarada dēvasiṁgi paṇḍitara śiṣyaṁ yamaniya
raṇamaunānuṣṭāṇaparāyaṇarappa dharmma
dhārāpUrvakaṁ poṁbuḻcada baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa gaṁge
yiṁ teṁka sarvvanamaśyamāge śrīsōmēśvaradēvargge gandha
rppatteṁṭu gēṇa gaḷeyoḷu biṭṭa matta rnnālku dēgulada
lliya naiṣṭikatapōdhanarggaṁ biṭṭa matta rnnālku satrakke biṭṭama
bādhāparihāramāge biṭṭa matta rppanneraḍuma nalliyā
ṇṇanuṁ pratipāḷisuvarintī dharmmamaṁ kādu naḍeyi
ḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ brāhmaṇarggameḻkō
vileyu nubhayamukhigoṭṭa paḷa
tīrtthasthānadoḷu sāsira brāhma
paṁcamahāpātaka
rādibhiḥ yasya
Digital edition of SII 11.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
